item.title: Take two acetaminophen and call me in the morning. I'll make this whole thing go away.
item.description: Autocracies are headed by one man but require the cooperation of many others. Some collaborators may sincerely share the autocrat’s goals, but opportunists provide a crucial margin of support. In the United States, such people now have to make a difficult calculation: Do the present benefits of submitting to Trump’s will outweigh the future hazards? Get appointed by Agent Orange. Go to prison eventually.
item.dc:creator: Shawnofavitch

item.title: Don't let this distract you from the Epstein files, but also don't let the Epstein files distract you from this..
item.description: ..their strategy is to "flood the zone", literally to give us too much to track it all, so that they can get through whatever we miss. https://www.instagram.com/wadrewhawkins
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Conservatives Quoting Monsters
item.description: Fp Edit: if you want to help the bearded guy on the screen maybe buy him a coffee? https://buymeacoffee.com/gridsquares So we're going to talk about context, sense a few of you want to try to explain away what is happening. Joseph Goebbels, oftentimes with Gaslight the people he was speaking to. He would use this methodology to rile up and move their base. They used it as a recruiting tactic, and they condemned anybody who dare call them out on their antics. The very process of him trying to equate the former administration, their enemies as it were according to their leader is the very same the Third Reich utilized. This is been studied for the past few decades and is very well understood. He is damned further when you look at the policies that he votes for, the ideals that he spouts elsewhere. It is not just this singular quote, but the entirety of his character and ideals. They very much parallel and sometimes mirror ideals from the Third Reich and other extremist groups who Vie for purity. Here we see Republican Congressional member Keith Self of Texas quoting propaganda minister of the Nazi party Joseph Goebbels https://youtube.com/shorts/WaX8CiwbPvs?si= hdZyGrfnhxlaoEM Where the shirt came from https://themandatoryfunday.com/en-usd/collections/all
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews

item.title: Many people have always wanted plots with randomly generated buildings, roads, and decorations.Here they are:
item.description: I essentially use two methods for the division. Firstly, Voronoi cells, which are generated from triangulation of a random Poisson disc sampling. The other is bisectional recursion. The initial polygon is divided into several smaller polygons by bisectional recursion - until the individual parts fall below a certain size. Some of the dividing lines are additionally bent to create more variation. Both the position as well as the course of the dividing lines is in one certain framework random. Object areas are then created along the segments in random size and orientation. I use the 3D environment of the Godot Engine. The individual object areas are then replaced by objects. The objects consist of hand-drawn textures and simple 3D structures. In addition, decorations such as trees, horse carts or crates are placed randomly, partly based on the street layout or the positions of the buildings.
item.dc:creator: mightofmerchants

item.title: Yup, they're literally KILLING us
item.description: The study compared more than 1 million emergency department visits and 121,000 ICU hospitalizations across 49 private equity hospitals to over 6 million emergency department visits and 760,000 ICU hospitalizations across 293 matched control hospitals.... Medicare beneficiaries in the emergency departments of private equity hospitals experienced seven additional deaths per 10,000 visits after acquisition relative to hospitals that were not acquired by private equity, the team found. This rise represented a 13 percent increase from a baseline of 52 deaths per 10,000 visits. https://hms.harvard.edu/news/deaths-rose-emergency-rooms-after-hospitals-were-acquired-private-equity-firms
item.dc:creator: azazyel

item.title: Being Trans Online is "Harmful To the Community" Apparently
item.description: That's why I got suspended this morning. It's what my suspension is marked under. Trying to appeal. Will probably do nothing. This is my livelihood, so this is a massive blow to my existence just... overall ya know... Update: Thanks for the nice words everybody, this really really sucks for me. If you want to show me any kind of support during this, maybe go check out my YouTube? I have been having fun making silly stuff over there lately including today's vid: https://youtu.be/G26offb_6ks
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: OMG - these people are hilariously stupid
item.description: https://boingboing.net/2025/09/23/app-for-snitching-on-charlie-kirk-critics-leaks-user-data.html Keep on getting grifted, dweebs. The world is laughing at you - but hey, you can downvote! Look how much power and respect you have access to! ???? I appreciate the laughs you Trump supporters provide, despite the hate. Always warms my heart to be reminded: you are the dumbest humans among us. LMFAO
item.dc:creator: NoCapForRealForReal

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1483 (a mess)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [attacks computer mouse vigorously, throwing it to floor] "okay." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.description: Kyrie, who is only 3.5 years old, has had hip displasia since a pup. It has been managed with pain meds, but today at the dog park she really hurt herself and can no longer walk. She's going to need investigative x-rays, and then likely surgery :'(
